# readnoaa

> Provides clean, tidy access to climate and weather data from the 'National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration' ('NOAA') via the 'National Centers for Environmental Information' ('NCEI') Data Se... Install with `install.packages("readnoaa")`.

Version: 0.1.2. License: MIT.

## Functions

- [`clear_cache()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/readnoaa/reference/clear_cache.html): Clear the readnoaa cache
- [`list_datasets()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/readnoaa/reference/list_datasets.html): List common NCEI datasets
- [`list_datatypes()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/readnoaa/reference/list_datatypes.html): List available data types for a dataset
- [`noaa_annual()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/readnoaa/reference/noaa_annual.html): Annual weather summaries
- [`noaa_daily()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/readnoaa/reference/noaa_daily.html): Daily weather observations
- [`noaa_get()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/readnoaa/reference/noaa_get.html): Fetch any NCEI dataset
- [`noaa_monthly()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/readnoaa/reference/noaa_monthly.html): Monthly weather summaries
- [`noaa_nearby()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/readnoaa/reference/noaa_nearby.html): Find stations near a location
- [`noaa_normals()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/readnoaa/reference/noaa_normals.html): Climate normals (1991-2020)
- [`noaa_stations()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/readnoaa/reference/noaa_stations.html): Search for weather stations

## Documentation

- [Full reference](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/readnoaa/reference/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/charlescoverdale/readnoaa)
- [CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=readnoaa)
